---
title: "5scaff2medaka"
format: html
---

```{r}
#| echo: false
#Loop that checks if the packages GO.db and AnnotationDbi are already installed
#If not, install them

p_check <- c("GO.db", "AnnotationDbi")

for(i in seq_along(p_check)){
  
  if(p_check[i] %in% installed.packages()[,"Package"]){
    print(paste("Package",p_check[i], "is already installed", sep = " "))
  }else{
    print(paste("installing package", p_check[i], sep = " ")) 
    BiocManager::install(p_check[i], force = TRUE)
  }
}
```

```{r}
#Install the ggVennDiagram package
install.packages("ggVennDiagram")
#Load packages
library("tidyverse")
library("Gviz")
library("GenomicFeatures")
library("rtracklayer")
library("Biostrings")
library("GO.db")
library("AnnotationDbi")
library("ggVennDiagram")
```
```{r}
gff_path <- "data/Ankur/Saccharomyces_cerevisiae.gff3"

txdb <- makeTxDbFromGFF(gff_path, format = "gff3")

txdb

biostring_assembly <- Biostrings::readDNAStringSet("data/Ankur/assembly.fasta")
which(width(biostring_assembly)==max(width(biostring_assembly)))
biostring_assembly[209]
which(seqlevels(txdb)=="scaffold_289")
seqlevels(txdb)

```

```{r}
options(ucscChromosomeNames=FALSE)

track <- GeneRegionTrack(txdb, 
                             chromosome = seqlevels(txdb)[211],
                             name = "Predicted Genes",
                             transcriptAnnotation = "gene",
                             background.title = "darkgreen")
```

```{r}
axis_track <- GenomeAxisTrack()

Scaffold_211 <- plotTracks(list(axis_track, track),
           from = 1, 
           to = 18000,
           chromosome = seqlevels(txdb)[211],
           main = "Funannotate Predictions: Scaffold 211")
```
```{r}
ggsave("figures/Ankur/Scaffold_211.png", plot = get_last_plot())
```

```{r}

```
